Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL YOUNG, HUI WU Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED. A partition action may not be properly asserted against a person who claims no interest in property at issue. Verified pleadings before the Court assert specifically that "this answering defendant claims not ownership interest in the subject real property of any kind." Having prevailed on this motion the moving defendant is judicially estopped from ever advancing a contrary position. The prevailing party is to submit a proposed order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Leslie Gomez, Not Recorded (501).

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Document Production Pursuant To Ccp Section 2031.320
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Hicks, Kern, Segal and Murray, appearing for Plaintiff Susan Duong Huan, Telephone 415-474-1900;
Russell A. Robinson, Law Offices of Russell A. Robinson, appearing for Defendants Michael Young and Hui Wu, Telephone 415-861-4416;

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. Parties are ordered to meet and confer.

Ruling - Argued - The Court adopts the tentative ruling with modifications as follows:

PLAINTIFF SUSAN HUANG'S Motion To Compel Document Production Pursuant To Ccp Section 2031.320 is Granted in whole. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $600.00. Counsel for the moving party to prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.132 and is to be emailed to Judge Pro Tem Stephen Zollman at szollman1@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Stephen Zollman; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Document Production Pursuant To Ccp Section 2031.320
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher S. Hicks, Esq. of Kern Segal & Murray, Tel. 415.474.1900, appearing for the plaintiff/moving party Susan Duong Huang;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Plaintiff stipulates that the matter may be heard by Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein.

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Plaintiff Susan Huang's Motion To Compel Document Production Pursuant To Ccp Section 2031.320
is unopposed and granted. The defendant shall provide all documents referenced in defendant's response within ten days of the date of this Order. Plaintiff shall prepare an Order which specifies the specific document categories remaining to be produced. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is denied based on failure to comply with the mandatory notice of motion requirements of C.C.P 2023.040. The moving party is to prepare a form of order and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reporter. =302/JPT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
